title: Epic Fight Plus - Pierced Animations
description: Better Animations for Epic Fight by PierceTH
body:
This simple resource pack overhauls a collection of epic fight animations.

Currently, 6 living animations have been added:

Idle
Walk
Run
Jump
Kneel
Sneak
> Compatible with Epic Fight in MC 1.20.1 <

Future Plans:

- Overhaul any other essential Living motion that does not have to do with movesets.

Thank you!!
